notes: Solid Frogger implementation with all core mechanics (logs, turtles, vehicles, home slots, lives, timer, levels), good controls with input buffering, decent visuals though sprites are geometric rather than pixel-art faithful, minor edge cases like platform drift and collision feel slightly off but overall very playable.
Beautiful presentation and complete features, but a critical bug in the movement logic fails to update the frog's column while drifting on logs, causing diagonal snapping when jumping up/down.

A solid and mostly complete Frogger clone, but some mechanics feel off from classic Frogger and there are likely edge-case gameplay inconsistencies around drifting/platform alignment and state handling.
